title: Ice Wraith Origin
description:
Adds the ice Wrath Origin into your world!
The Origin offers a unique blend of strengths and weaknesses, creating a challenging and engaging gameplay experience..
body:
Ethereal entities, bound to the ice and snow. They possess the ability to manipulate ice and cold. While they may appear otherworldly and distant, they are guardians of the winter, ensuring balance and harmony in the icy realms..

Origin created by Chris_The_Big!                                                           
Made for the Winter Jam on the Origins Discord Server! 

Pehkui can be used for normal blocks to act like slabs but it's not required..
This took me way longer to make that I initially thought..
But I'm happy with how it turned out!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Swiftness**                                                                                  
You are faster on foot and you run very fast on Ice!                                         
**Frost Punch**                                                                                   
While attacking someone, you have to freeze them, slowing them down but giving them resistance.  
**Ice Touch**                                                                                      
You are able to pick up Ice blocks without Silk Touch.                                           
**Tasty Ice**                                                                                         
You can eat Ice blocks, which grant you Speed and Haste.                                        
**Snowier**                                                                                         
You have mastery over powdered snow. You only sink in it when you want too and take no freezing damage.                                                                                       
**Heavy Armor**                                                                                 
Any armor set that uses Gold is too heavy for you to wear.                                           
**Melting**                                                                                        
When in hot biomes you become slower, weaker and are unable to hit mobs without tools.          
**Deadly Fire**                                                                                    
Fire is one of your major weaknesses.                                                         
**Inhuman Hands**                                                                               
You are unable to use a shield due to your Icy hands.

</details>
